sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK CHAR(1)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK CHAR(1)

sql.oracle: UPDATE AD_FCCONFIG SET DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK = NVL(DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK, 'N') WHERE DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK IS NULL
sql.mssql: UPDATE AD_FCCONFIG SET DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK = ISNULL(DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK, 'N') WHERE DISABLE_DUPLICATE_CHECK IS NULL
